events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'True Colors', was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday! Still bringing those vibrant 80s vibes and timeless anthems. Which Cyndi track is your ultimate singalong?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: British music icon George Michael, born Georgios Kyriacos Panayiotou on June 25, 1963, passed away in 2016.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move generations.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: The 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, passed away on June 25, 2009, at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's influence on music, dance, and culture remains unparalleled. What's your favourite MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr (born Richard Starkey), celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Sending big birthday wishes to the one and only Ringo Starr. Keep those good vibes and peace signs coming.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, astrophysicist, and animal welfare advocate, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! From stadium anthems to his incredible guitar solos, he truly is rock royalty.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943, and turns 83 today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. The ultimate rock and roll frontman.

events.title: MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched in the US, forever changing the music industry, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV arrived and changed music forever. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is not lost on us!

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' release
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis unleashed 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, a generation gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in cultural history.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: The 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, we said goodbye to the King, Elvis Presley. His music and legend live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His voice and message continue to resonate decades after his untimely passing.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: The world lost a true guitar visionary on this day. Remembering Jimi Hendrix and his revolutionary sound.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' release
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Legacy
angles.copy: The album cover is as famous as the music within. Celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road', an enduring masterpiece.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951, and celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Chick Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and inspiring with her timeless cool.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad Fer It Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the swagger.

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK on October 24, 1971, becoming a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod launch
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, changing how we listen to music forever. Who remembers their first one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and his incredible cinematic legacy. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on October 9, 1940, and tragically passed away in 1980.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the unparalleled genius of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
